Main Office:

14261 S. Dixie Highway
Miami, FL. 33176

Phone: (305) 235-5000

Fax: (305) 235-5004

Email:  info@dadepump.com

Company History:

Since 1960, Dade Pump and Supply Company DBA De Ruiter Electric Motor Company has provided courteous, professional service to the local South Florida market, all throughout the USA and internationally. Our reliable staff of committed professionals has over 150 years of combined experience in the electric motor, pump and repair industry.

In our many years of business, we have acquired the tools of the trade to make your choices easier. Our facility is equipped with all the appropriate equipment as well as a large inventory of replacement parts to keep your downtime to a minimum. We can also custom build and assemble specific pumps to fit your unique requirements. You provide us with the specifics and we will provide you with the pump motor solution.

Dade Pump and Supply Company represents many leading manufacturers of the most well made and reputable products on the market. Our sales staff is trained to select the correct unit for your application, and provide expert service from start to finish.

Give De Ruiter Electric Motor Supply Company an opportunity to prove that together with our competitive prices, exceptional service, and outstanding selection we can be your one-stop electric motor, pump and accessories supply and repair company. 

Industries we serve include wastewater, irrigation, sewage, agriculture, water circulation, HVAC, booster service, pond, pool, chillers, filtration among many. Fluid handling is a diverse field - allow us to help find a solution for your specific needs.
Repair facility located in Miami, FL
